nasb.text: Then Rebekah took the best garments of Esau her elder son, which were with her in the house, and put them on Jacob her younger son.

esv.text: Then Rebekah took the best garments of Esau her older son, which were with her in the house, and put them on Jacob her younger son.

cnv.text: 利百加又把大兒子以掃留在家裡最好的衣服拿來，給她小兒子雅各穿上。

ccb.text: 利百加又拿了大儿子以扫留在家里最好的衣服，给小儿子雅各穿上，

csbs.text: 莉白加拿了大儿子以扫在家里最好的衣服，给小儿子雅各穿上；
